  FreeBSD src repository

  Modified files:
    release              fixit.profile 
  Log:
  - Add extra paths for GEOM_LIBRARY_PATH to the fixit environment to enable all
    geom commands in a chrooted environment on the livefs cd.
  
  PR:             misc/120169

  MFC after:      2 days
